name: Heroic Challenger - Swordshield
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｈ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒロイック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>チャレンジャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ソード・シールド
desc: During either player's turn, if you control a face-up "Heroic" monster: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, you take no Battle Damage and "Heroic" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn, if you control a face-up "Heroic" monster: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, you take no Battle Damage and "Heroic" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle.
eff: During either player's turn, if you control a face-up "Heroic" monster: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, you take no Battle Damage and "Heroic" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
